case_title: BARRY & TONG vs. SATURDAY CONSTRUCTION INC.

docket_entries.description: PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PLAINTIFF BARRY & TONG AS TO DEFENDANT SATURDAY CONSTRUCTION INC.
HEARING FOR PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF BARRY & TONG HEARING SET FOR SEP-23-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 06
PROOF OF PERSONAL SERVICE OF PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD; NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD; P/A; DECLARATION
LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 06, HEARING FOR PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD, CALENDAR OF SEP-23-1994, TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SATURDAY CONSTRUCTION INC. $11,531.00 PRINCIPAL, $735.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $94.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $12,360.00
